searchPlaceholder.default: 搜索艺术家、专辑或曲目
searchPlaceholder.airGap: 搜索您的音乐库 — 目录已屏蔽
searchPlaceholder.offline: 搜索您的音乐库 — 无网络

shell.searchAriaLabel: 搜索艺术家、专辑或曲目
shell.androidServerBanner: Optional: add your Sandbox Server URL in Settings → Addons for downloads and Connect. Basic playback works without it.
shell.tauriCastBanner: Sandbox Cast does not run inside the desktop app. Open in Chrome or Edge on this PC (same Wi‑Fi as your TV), then use Cast from the player.
shell.tvCoverageBanner: TV mode: Home, Discover, Locker, and Settings are remote-friendly. Search, Podcasts, and Insights use phone layouts — Locker, Playlists, and Feed are partial on a TV remote.

welcome.headline: Welcome to Sandbox Music
welcome.body: Your local-first music console. Personalize your station in a few quick steps — or skip anytime.
welcome.desktopBody: Your music, on your device. Store files in your locker, play your library, and optionally connect Sandbox Server on your network. A few quick steps — or skip anytime.

name.title: What should we call you?
name.hint: Optional — shown in your profile. Change anytime in Settings.

taste.title: What do you listen to?
taste.hint: Pick genres or add artists — helps Discover and Feed learn your taste.

locker.title: Where should Locker music live?
locker.hint: Optional — choose a folder on this device for imported and downloaded tracks.
locker.mobileHint: 下载和导入会自动保存到应用的私有存储 — 移动设备上无需选择文件夹。
locker.browseDesktopOnly: Folder picking requires the desktop app
locker.desktopFootnote: Leave blank to use the default app storage. You can change this later in Settings → Vault.
locker.mobileNote: On this device, Locker uses private app storage. Cross-device sync is available via Settings → Vault.
locker.webNote: In the browser, Locker is stored locally in this profile. For a disk folder, use the desktop app.
locker.webDesktopCta: Use the desktop app to choose a folder on disk.
locker.settingsLater: Skip if unsure — you can set this anytime in Settings → Vault.

server.title: Sandbox Server
server.hint: Optional home server for downloads, Connect, and mesh feed.
server.offHint: Local locker playback works without a server.
server.remoteHint: Point at a PC or NAS on your home network.
server.remoteSettingsLater: Enter the address now, or set it later in Settings → Addons.

identity.title: Your node on the mesh
identity.hint: This device fingerprint identifies your node on the Sandbox mesh. It stays on this device.

cast.title: Cast to your TV
cast.dlnaTitle: Sonos & network speakers — in this app
cast.dlnaHint: With Sandbox Server running on your network, use the Cast button on the player and tap Scan network to find Sonos or UPnP speakers. Playback stays in the desktop app — no browser needed.
cast.chromecastHint: Cast audio or the visualizer to Chromecast, Android TV, or NVIDIA Shield. Open Sandbox Music in Chrome or Edge on this PC (same Wi‑Fi as your TV).
cast.settingsLater: You can also find this under Settings → Fidelity → Sandbox Cast.
cast.hint: The desktop app WebView cannot run Google Cast. Keep using Sandbox Music here for playback — open the same app in Chrome or Edge when you want to cast audio or the visualizer to a TV on your Wi‑Fi.

finish.headline: You're all set
finish.body: Your station is ready. Explore your locker, Discover new music, and tune Settings anytime.

player.castBrowser: 在浏览器中打开以投射
player.resolveTimedOut: Stream resolve timed out — player cleared

mixRadioSave.intro: Choose how to save these tracks.
mixRadioSave.optionPlaylistDesc: Saved to Discover and Locker playlists — playable without full download.
mixRadioSave.optionLockerDesc: Save full audio files to your device when available.
mixRadioSave.toastLockerAlready: Tracks are already in your Locker

home.searchPrompt: 在上方搜索以开始播放
home.playHistory: 播放历史将随收听积累
home.localStats: 本地统计 · 私密 · 不上传

settings.title: 设置
settings.subtitle: 定制高保真偏好与分区沙盒管理。

categories.playbackDesc: Gapless, crossfade, sleep timer, and car mode
categories.vinylDesc: Record player visuals, genre themes, and community packs
categories.aboutDesc: App info, guides, and getting started

about.title: About Sandbox Music
about.hint: Quick reference for optional features — no popups on launch; open panels here when you need them.
about.tagline: Local-first music console — locker, playback, and optional home-server integrations.
about.gettingStartedLocker: Add music in Locker — upload tracks or folders from your device.
about.gettingStartedServer: Optional Sandbox Server (Settings → Add-ons) unlocks downloads, locker search, and feed releases.
about.gettingStartedConnect: Multi-device playback and Connect role (host/remote) live in Settings → Playback.
about.gettingStartedCar: Car Mode is in Settings → Playback — large controls for in-vehicle use on Android.
about.addonGuideHint: Host a JSON file over HTTPS. Sandbox reads name, version, and search level (1–4).
about.connectHint: Enable multi-device playback in Playback settings, then pick host, remote, or auto role and set your Sandbox Server URL.

fidelity.title: 音频保真解码分辨率
fidelity.hint: 配置活动分辨率限制。真正的监听音箱需要无损以绕过压缩。
fidelity.standardDesc: 1411 kbps 标准网络音频文件解码
fidelity.highDesc: 预加载 24 位 FLAC 容器
fidelity.castTitle: 扬声器与 SANDBOX 投射输出
fidelity.castHint: Cast audio to a receiver on your network, or show the visualizer on TV{customReceiver}.
fidelity.castOpenChrome: Open in Chrome for Sandbox Cast
fidelity.castRequiresChrome: Sandbox Cast requires Chrome or Edge. Use screen mirror below on Firefox.
fidelity.castAutoCastHint: Cast to the default Sandbox Cast device when a track is loaded.
fidelity.castServerRequired: Start your Sandbox Server to enable speaker streaming
fidelity.networkSpeakersHint: Stream to home network speakers on your local network. Requires your Sandbox Server running on your home network.
fidelity.customReceiverHint: TV visualizer requires a custom cast receiver ID in app configuration. Audio casting uses the default media receiver.

language.title: 语言
language.hint: 选择界面语言。更改将立即应用于整个应用。
language.active: 当前：{code} — 已保存在此设备。

architect.panelHint: 内联调整 CSS 变量、圆角、强调色和排版。
architect.readabilityHint: 字体和大小适用于主页、音乐库、DJ 控制台及所有站点。

presets.focusDesc: Calm gray surfaces for long sessions. Blue focus highlights.
presets.tacticalMidnightDesc: Dark cockpit with orange-tinted borders. Legacy orange focus.
presets.lightCanvasDesc: Bright daylight surfaces with dark hairline borders.
presets.hcTerminalDesc: High-contrast near-black and olive with gold focus.
presets.deepOceanDesc: Blue-black depths with teal panels and cyan borders.
presets.bloodMoonDesc: Aggressive dark red with vivid red focus.

architect.engineHint: Adjust the focus highlight color. Brand orange on buttons and marks stays the same.
architect.heroDisplayHint: Choose what shows on the Home vinyl and player bar thumbnail.
architect.heroDisplayVinylShadesDesc: Colored record gradient that changes per track.
architect.albumCardHint: 缩放专辑和播放列表卡片。越大每行越少，细节越多。
architect.vinylVisualsHint: Opt-in psychedelic effects on the home record player. Default is subtle — crank sliders for wild mode.
architect.vinylUniverseIntensityHint: Master dial — ambient glow and overall trippiness.
architect.vinylColorThrowHint: Streaks and beams radiating from the vinyl.
architect.vinylPulseHint: Ambient pulse speed and depth while playing.
architect.vinylHueDriftHint: Slow rotating hue shift over time.
architect.vinylSpinTrailHint: Motion blur and afterimage on the spinning disc.
architect.vinylWarpHint: Subtle scale and skew oscillation on the disc.
architect.recordPlayerAddonsHint: Install visual packs from the community. Sliders above fine-tune any active pack. One pack active at a time.
architect.recordPlayerAddonUrlRequired: Paste a pack manifest URL first.
architect.recordPlayerAddonImportFailed: Clipboard JSON is not a valid pack.
architect.controlsHint: Keyboard bindings and search UI preferences.
architect.shortcutsHint: Global bindings when not typing in a field.
architect.searchSortHint: Controls artist album and single listings in search drill-down.

vinyl.title: VINYL SETTINGS
vinyl.hint: Customize the home record player visuals. Official presets ship with Sandbox; community packs are user-installed only.
vinyl.displayModeManualHint: Pick an official preset and fine-tune with sliders.
vinyl.displayModeFollowGenreHint: Auto-switch visuals from the current track's genre metadata.
vinyl.officialPresetsHint: Built-in Sandbox looks — tap Use to activate. No install required.
vinyl.genreMappingHint: When Follow genre is on, these official Sandbox presets apply per detected genre.
vinyl.visualSlidersHint: Fine-tune any mode — values blend at 50% with the active preset or genre theme.
vinyl.mobilePreviewNote: Preview quality on this device — sliders store your preferences, but streaks, rings, and warp are capped for battery and frame rate. Open on desktop or a wide browser window for full vinyl effects. Neon Trip preset stays desktop-only.
vinyl.universeIntensityHint: Master dial — ambient glow and overall trippiness.
vinyl.colorThrowHint: Streaks and beams radiating from the vinyl.
vinyl.pulseHint: Ambient pulse speed and depth while playing.
vinyl.hueDriftHint: Slow rotating hue shift over time.
vinyl.spinTrailHint: Motion blur and afterimage on the spinning disc.
vinyl.warpHint: Subtle scale and skew oscillation on the disc.
vinyl.communityPacksHint: Only packs you install from a URL, catalog, or clipboard appear here.
vinyl.communityEmpty: No community packs installed yet — browse the catalog or install from a URL.
vinyl.installUrlRequired: Paste a pack manifest URL first.
vinyl.importFailed: Clipboard JSON is not a valid pack.

playback.title: 内部播放编排器
playback.hint: 调整时间轴缓冲和无间隙播放行为。
playback.gaplessDesc: Pre-load the next track so playback continues without a pause.
playback.crossfadeDesc: Blend the end of one track into the start of the next.
playback.multiDeviceDesc: Keep playback in sync across devices on your home network. The host plays audio; other devices send transport commands.
playback.multiDeviceSetupHint: Role, device name, and Sandbox Server URL for home-network playback sync.
playback.roleHint: Role on your home network. Auto picks host on desktop and remote on phone. Effective:
playback.miniPlayerHint: Choose how playback appears when you leave the app on Android.
playback.miniPlayerOff: Off — lock screen and notification only
playback.miniPlayerPip: Picture in picture — floating album art window
playback.miniPlayerTopBar: System top bar — notification shade / now playing
playback.miniPlayerTopBarNote: Top bar style uses your phone's system now playing (lock screen + notification shade). OEM mini capsules (Realme, OnePlus, etc.) appear when the OS supports them; this app cannot replicate Dynamic Island on all devices.
playback.nativePlaybackDesc: 默认 Android 解码路径 — WebView 外的 ExoPlayer，确保后台稳定和无缝专辑。离线 locker 曲目通过 IndexedDB 的 content:// 流式传输，无需 tier34 HTTP。
playback.webViewCrossfadeDesc: 需要曲目间软件交叉淡化时，可选择 WebView 内的 HTMLAudioElement 解码。启用后会禁用 ExoPlayer。
playback.scrobbleHint: Send now-playing and scrobbles when a track finishes or passes 50% listened. API keys respect Ephemeral Chamber when enabled.
playback.scrobbleLastfmDesc: Now playing + scrobble via audioscrobbler API. Requires API key and session key from Last.fm.
playback.scrobbleListenbrainzDesc: Submit listens to ListenBrainz. Requires a user token from listenbrainz.org.
playback.scrobbleAirGapHint: Air-Gap Mode blocks outbound scrobbling unless a LAN Sandbox Server relays Last.fm requests. See docs/scrobbling.md.
playback.scrobbleLastfmSetupStep1: 1. Create an API account at last.fm/api/account/create
playback.scrobbleLastfmSetupStep2: 2. Paste your API key above, then open the auth link below in a browser
playback.scrobbleLastfmSetupStep3: 3. After approving, copy the session key (sk) from the redirect URL or use Last.fm's getSession API
playback.replayGainDiagnosticsHint: Live loudness normalization on the ReplayGain Web Audio stage (independent of user volume).
playback.audioOutputHint: Current Android playback route. Bluetooth and wired headphones are selected automatically by the OS.
playback.sonicHint: Tuned for your speaker. Stays on your device.
playback.sonicEnableDesc: ReplayGain loudness match, device-aware EQ, soft limiting, and ear-safe listening — all processed locally.
playback.sonicEarSafeDesc: After long sessions at high volume, gently lowers gain to protect your hearing. Never blocks volume entirely.
playback.sonicEarSafeToast: Listening level softened to protect your ears. You can turn this off in Settings → Playback.
playback.sonicRouteAndroidNote: Route is detected by Android and updates when you connect headphones or Bluetooth.
playback.sonicOutputOverrideHint: Override output tuning when Auto doesn't detect your setup.
playback.sonicRouteDesktopNote: On Windows and Linux desktop, choose Speaker, Headphones, or Line out when Auto shows Unknown.
playback.sonicCastNote: Enhanced audio applies on this device (phone speaker, wired, Bluetooth, TV WebView, laptop). In-app cast from your phone processes audio before streaming to Chromecast or similar. Pure Alexa skills, Sonos app, or other external players are outside this app.
playback.audiophileHintSupported: Bit-perfect native output via WASAPI exclusive on Windows. Bypasses WebView resampling; FLAC/WAV decode in Rust. Disabled by default.
playback.audiophileHintUnsupported: Native audiophile playback requires the Sovereign desktop (Tauri) build on Windows.
playback.audiophileDesktopOnly: Available in the Sovereign desktop (Tauri) build only.
playback.audiophileEnableDesc: Routes playback to the native engine instead of HTMLAudioElement.
playback.audiophileExclusiveDesc: Direct device access at source sample rate (Windows).
playback.audiophileDecodeNote: MP3/AAC are software-decoded to PCM (not passthrough). Volume, crossfade, and ReplayGain Web Audio stages are bypassed in audiophile mode.
playback.carModeHint: Large touch targets and locked navigation for in-vehicle playback on Android. Also available from the player bar car icon or long-press on now playing.
playback.carModeSuggestDesc: Show a one-time prompt to enter Car Mode when the app opens.

addons.builtinStationsHint: Optional stations that appear in the station menu when enabled.
addons.discoverStationHint: Feed, Explore, and Playlists in one station. Feed shows new releases from your home music server when the Sandbox Server is running. Chart picks work without it.
addons.lockerAutoFollowHint: Automatically follow artists in your Locker so their new releases and tour dates appear in Feed. Unfollow any artist to stop.
addons.followedReleaseNotifHint: Show a count on Discover when artists you follow release new music. Updates appear in the Feed tab — not on Home.
addons.acquisitionHint: Catalog downloads, podcast indexer and premium download keys, and full-text locker search. Requires the Sandbox Server on your network (Settings → Addons → Server URL).
addons.sandboxIndexerHint: Built into the Sandbox Server — yt-dlp + Archive.org search. No external Prowlarr required for basic acquire.
addons.sandboxIndexerOffline: Start Sandbox Server to enable built-in indexer
addons.torznabHint: Self-hosted Jackett or Torznab URLs you configure — not required for Archive.org or yt-dlp search.
addons.externalIndexerHint: Optional — external Prowlarr for private trackers (advanced). Sandbox Indexer works without this.
addons.serverUrlOptionalHint: Leave blank for standalone use. Add your PC or NAS URL for downloads, mesh feed, Connect, and locker sync.
addons.serverUrlMobileHint: On mobile, enter your computer's local IP address, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:3001. Find it: Windows → ipconfig | Mac/Linux → ifconfig
addons.podcastIndexerKeyPlaceholder: From your podcast indexer app → Settings → General
addons.premiumDownloadsKeyPlaceholder: From your premium download service account page
addons.serverSetupHint: Start the Sandbox Server on your PC or NAS and enter its URL above. Catalog links use the download helper on the server; premium downloads work when keys are set.
addons.lockerSearchHint: {status} — searches your locker by title, artist, and album.
addons.lockerSearchFootnote: Uses Meilisearch on the Sandbox Server.
addons.experimentalHint: Reveal built-in placeholder addons (SoundCloud, WebTorrent, IPFS) in Settings and search. Off by default — user-installed manifest addons are always visible.
addons.experimentalHiddenHint: Built-in placeholder addons are hidden. Enable Show Experimental Integrations under Settings → Addons → Downloads & Search to try SoundCloud, WebTorrent, and IPFS placeholders.
addons.djConsoleDesc: Show the DJ mixer in the station menu. Enable DJ audio routing below for 2-deck Web Audio crossfade and stem mixing.
addons.djAudioRoutingDesc: Route locker deck URLs through Web Audio with crossfade, EQ, and Demucs stem mixes. Off = visual-only DJ Console.
addons.stemSeparationHint: Server-side stem separation for the DJ Console Stems tab. Requires Demucs on the Sandbox Server host.
addons.stemSeparationUnavailable: Demucs not installed — on the server host run: docker compose --profile stems up
addons.personalAddonPackHint: Pre-installed dev-test addons wired to tier34 resolve. Toggle enable/disable — built-ins cannot be removed.
addons.statusExperimentalHint: Resolve works when the Sandbox Server is configured and this addon is enabled.
addons.devBadgeHint: Dev-test addon — tier34 resolve when server URL is configured.
addons.feedStationHint: Shows new releases from your home music server when the Sandbox Server is running on your network. Chart picks in Feed work without it.

security.title: 防御协议
security.hint: 加强凭据存储、tier34 代理暴露和会话卫生。
security.airGapHint: Block all outbound internet from the app. Your locker, playlists, locker search on the Sandbox Server, and downloads stored on the server still work. Catalog search, metadata, podcast feeds, streaming links, and new downloads are disabled.
security.ephemeralChamberHint: Store podcast indexer and premium download keys in session-only storage (cleared when the tab closes).
security.ghostProtocolHint: Remove API keys and sign-in tokens from storage when you sign out.
security.lanPartyHint: Air-gap preset for Connect + DLNA + offline locker only — zero WAN. See docs/air-gap-lan-party.md for car Pi + phone hotspot setup.
security.defenseProtocolHint: Restricts which sites the Sandbox Server can proxy for streaming. Controlled on the server — this toggle is informational only.
security.dataPersistenceHint: Keep theme and playback preferences on this device. When off, non-secret preferences are cleared when the tab closes.
security.serverKeysHint: Store podcast indexer and premium download keys in the Sandbox Server host environment so keys never leave your home server. UI security headers are enabled in the main app.

diagnostics.title: 诊断
diagnostics.hint: 端到端 Tier34 验证：音乐库同步、获取、媒体图、Connect 和投射。
diagnostics.sovereignStatusHint: Live health for Sandbox Server, locker search, download helper, network speakers, multi-device playback, and locker sync. Offline rows explain what still works on this device. Auto-refreshes every 20s.
diagnostics.sovereignValidationLink: Need deeper checks? Use the server validation suite below.
diagnostics.sovereignChecking: Checking Sandbox Server, locker search, download helper, network speakers, multi-device playback, and locker sync…
diagnostics.validationIdleHint: Run validation to check Sandbox Server health, locker sync, multi-device relay, and speaker streams. Start your Sandbox Server on the host machine first.
diagnostics.clearCacheHint: Remove cached feed, charts, explore picks, and lyrics stored on this device. Your library and settings are not affected.
diagnostics.serverUnreachableAndroid: Sandbox Server not reachable — on mobile, set your PC's local IP in Settings → Addons
diagnostics.serverUnreachableDesktop: Sandbox Server not reachable — run npm run dev:tier34 on your computer

vault.title: 设备容量保险库
vault.hint: 配置用于索引二进制媒体的硬件缓冲分区大小。
vault.downloadStorageHint: Catalog downloads do not go to your OS Downloads folder by default. They are saved to your locker on this device. To also keep files on disk, run the Sandbox Server on the machine where you want music stored and enable cross-device sync.
vault.lockerLocationHint: On-device library — private to this profile in this browser. Use cross-device locker sync below to replicate your library to the Sandbox Server.
vault.lockerLocationHintNative: 设备上的音乐库 — 存储在本设备的应用私有存储中。使用下方的跨设备 locker 同步，将音乐库复制到 Sandbox Server。
vault.serverStorageHint: Music files are stored on the Sandbox Server host (not on this device). Override the folder in the host server environment or see server logs for the full path.
vault.serverStorageIdle: Start your Sandbox Server to see the on-disk music folder.
vault.networkSpeakersHint: Let other devices on your network browse and play your locker library via the Sandbox Server.
vault.networkSpeakersEnvHint: Enabled in server settings at startup. The toggle here applies until the Sandbox Server restarts.
vault.networkSpeakersRuntimeHint: Changes apply immediately. Set the default in the server environment to turn on at boot.
vault.networkSpeakersIdle: Start your Sandbox Server to configure network speaker sharing.
vault.syncHint: Export or import your library list, sync via cloud folder, or mirror music files through the Sandbox Server.
vault.syncSelectiveHint: Only pull albums marked Sync this album in Locker → Albums menu. Cloud file sync for music files — use cloud folder sync or Sandbox Server.
vault.watchFolderHint: The Sandbox Server watches a folder and imports new audio into your locker. This imports from a path — it is not where catalog downloads are saved.
vault.watchFolderPickerHint: Enter the folder path manually, or set a default watch folder in the Sandbox Server host environment.
vault.ingestionGraphHint: Imports run on the machine where the Sandbox Server is started.
vault.deviceIdentityHint: This is your node's absolute cryptographic signature on the Sovereign Mesh.
vault.sandboxServerHint: Optional home-server modules — Downloads, Locker, Search, Connect, Feed, Cast, AI, Reef. Streaming and Locker work without it.
vault.sandboxServerModeRemoteDesc: Use a Sandbox Server running elsewhere.
vault.sandboxServerOverlayHint: Over cellular or CGNAT, use your self-hosted overlay address (Headscale/Tailscale or Nebula). See docs/overlay-network.md — not a public relay.
vault.aggressiveCacheHint: Before playback, download the entire track into stream cache. Survives brief dead zones on cellular; falls back to streaming if prefetch fails or exceeds the size cap. Requires stream cache enabled.
vault.sandboxServerDownloadToLocker: Download acquired tracks to this device's Locker
vault.sandboxServerAutoStart: Start server automatically when app opens
vault.defaultDownloadMirrorSuffix: + Sandbox Server when sync is enabled
vault.defaultDownloadSyncHint: — enable Sandbox Server full sync to mirror music files to disk
vault.defaultDownloadImportHint: To import files from an existing music folder (not download TO it), use {watchFolder} below — that watches a path and imports into your locker library list.
vault.streamCacheDesc: Temporary local audio for replay without re-resolving server URLs. Lighter than Locker — no album credits or permanent vault slot. Entries expire after 7 days and are evicted when the cache limit is reached.

telemetry.title: SIGNAL BENCH
telemetry.hint: Inspect search cache and provider health on your Sandbox Server.
telemetry.collectionIdle: Start your Sandbox Server to view library catalog stats.
telemetry.collectionHealHint: Missing file repair: Settings → Device Capacity → watch folder ingestion, or the server repair endpoint when configured.

sleep.title: 睡眠与唤醒
sleep.subtitle: 音乐闹钟
sleep.playForSuggestions: 播放曲目或添加到音乐库以获取建议。
sleep.searchCatalog: 搜索目录中的唤醒曲目
sleep.searchLocker: 搜索音乐库或最近播放
sleep.airGapOnline: 气隙模式已开启。在线目录搜索已禁用 — 请使用音乐库或建议。
sleep.typeTwoChars: 至少输入 2 个字符以搜索目录。
sleep.noCatalogTracks: 未找到目录曲目。请尝试上方的建议标签。
sleep.noTracksFound: 未找到曲目。请先播放或添加到音乐库。
sleep.catalogPreview: 目录预览（约 30 秒）。将曲目获取到音乐库以获得完整长度的唤醒闹钟，尤其在 Android 上。

connect.title: 设置 Sandbox Connect
connect.hostUrlHint: 将遥控器指向在局域网运行 tier34 的机器（手机上不要用 localhost）。
connect.roleHint: 主机播放音频并发布状态。遥控器仅发送传输命令。
connect.roleAutoHint: 桌面或 Tauri = 主机。手机或平板 = 遥控器。
connect.roleHostHint: 此设备播放音频并将队列状态同步到遥控器。
connect.roleRemoteHint: 仅控制界面 — 播放保留在主机上。
connect.deviceHint: 显示给局域网中的其他 Connect 对等方。可选 — 留空则生成默认名称。
connect.urlRequired: 请输入 tier34 后端 URL。
connect.urlProtocol: URL 必须使用 http:// 或 https://。
connect.urlHost: 请输入有效的主机地址。
connect.healthFailed: Tier34 /health 无响应。请检查主机是否在局域网上运行。
connect.cannotReach: 无法连接到该 URL 的 tier34。
connect.healthOkRelayTimeout: 健康检查通过。对等同步中继未及时响应 — Connect 可能仍可用。
connect.connected: 已连接 — tier34 健康检查和对等同步中继均可达。
connect.healthOkWsFailed: 健康检查通过。对等同步 WebSocket 无法连接 — 请检查防火墙规则。
connect.healthOkWsBlocked: 健康检查通过。无法从此浏览器打开对等同步 WebSocket。

offline.label: 离线

searchHint.airGap: 气隙模式已开启。目录和艺术家图片被屏蔽；此设备上的音乐库和播放列表仍可用。
searchHint.noInternet: 无网络。目录搜索和艺术家图片不可用；此设备上的音乐库仍可用。
searchHint.tier34Offline: Tier34 不可达。动态、获取、Connect 和音乐库同步需要 tier34；仍可浏览和播放此设备上存储的曲目。

offline.meilisearchDegraded: 音乐库搜索使用设备内匹配（全文索引离线）。

feed.airGap: 气隙模式会阻止动态。请在设置中关闭，或在本地网络运行 Tier34。
feed.noInternet: 动态需要本地网络上的 Tier34 服务器。打开设置 → 诊断以检查服务器状态。
feed.offline: 在设置 → 插件中开启 Tier34，或打开诊断以检查服务器状态。

offline.lockerSearch: Tier34 离线 — 仅搜索此设备上存储的曲目。
offline.connect: Connect 需要局域网上的 tier34 对等同步。请检查设置 → 主权系统状态。

acquire.airGap: 气隙模式激活时获取功能已禁用。

menu.identifyFromCatalogHint: 从 MusicBrainz 和其他目录源修复此专辑所有曲目的艺术家、年份、流派和封面（仅在已知艺术家时使用目录查找）。

feed.title: 动态
feed.subtitle: Tier34 服务器在线时，显示来自您自托管服务器的新发布。
feed.networkUnavailableNotice: Network releases unavailable — showing catalog picks
feed.meshEmptyHint: No releases from your home server yet — here is music you can play now.

error.title: Could not load network feed
error.timeout: The request timed out. Check Settings → Addons or Diagnostics.
error.failed: Could not reach your network server. Check Settings → Addons or Diagnostics.

empty.title: 暂无新内容
empty.message: 当 Tier34 服务器索引到新发布时，它们会显示在这里。

follow.emptyHint: Follow artists to see new music and tour dates here.

artist.noSingles: No singles found for this artist.
artist.noAlbums: No albums found for this artist.
artist.catalogUnreachable: Online catalog is unavailable — showing locker albums only.
artist.discographyPartial: Some studio albums may be missing from this list.
artist.discographySupplemented: Full studio discography — matched to the Sandbox catalog where previews are available.
artist.playbackUnavailable: No stream available for this track

artist.playbackExoFailed: Playback failed — try again or disable ExoPlayer in Settings → Playback
artist.configureSandboxForStream: Configure Sandbox Server in Settings to stream catalog tracks
artist.playbackSandboxUnreachable: Sandbox Server not reachable — start tier34 (Settings → Sandbox Server) or play 30s catalog previews offline
